options.name: -help
options.description: Prints out the command usage

options.name: <sessionDirectory>
options.description: Specifies the directory from which to load the design.

options.name: <design>
options.description: Specifies the design name.

options.name: <netListFile>
options.description: Specifies the name of new netlist file.

options.name: -1801File
options.description: Specifies the name of the new 1801 file

options.name: -addHierPortForTieOff
options.description: Allows tie cells to connect to the tie pins across hierarchical boundaries if other constraints.

options.name: -allow_to_load_binary_timing_file
options.description: Turn on this option to allow tool load the binary timing graph or timing constraint file.

options.name: -cpfFile
options.description: Specifies the name of the new CPF file

options.name: -def
options.description: Force loading DEF file which is previously saved under the design directory.

options.name: -ecoMMMC
options.description: Specifies the name of the ECO view definition file.

options.name: -ecoSDC
options.description: Specifies the name of the new SDC file.

options.name: -fillerPrefix
options.description: Specifies the prefix of the cell instances to delete.

options.name: -keepInstLoc
options.description: Keep instance location when loading place file.

options.name: -lef_files
options.description: Specifies the LEF files name for loading. Use this option if you want to replace the existing LEF files in the original design with new LEF files instead. Refer to restoreDesign -lef_files for more details and limitations.

options.name: -modifyOnlyLayers
options.description: Specifies the layer range that are allowed to be modified during eco route. <MLb:MLt>

options.name: -noAddFiller
options.description: Skips filler insertion in pre-mask eco flow.

options.name: -noDeleteFiller
options.description: Do not remove physical cell instances, such as filler cells, end-cap cells, and well-tap cells.

options.name: -noEcoPlace
options.description: Skips eco place & eco route processes.

options.name: -noEcoRoute
options.description: Prevents routing during the ECO process.

options.name: -noTiming
options.description: Ignores timing libraries and MMMC configuration

options.name: -place_detail_use_GA_filler_groups
options.description: Specifies that filler cell instances will only be replaced by logic instances that belong to the same GA groups.

options.name: -postMask
options.description: Specifies that the changes are being made on a post-mask design.

options.name: -reportFile
options.description: Specifies the name of the report file.

options.name: -skipCcopt
options.description: Skips restore ccopt config, for signoffTimeDesign

options.name: -spareCells
options.description: Specifies the name of the spare cell to use during the ECO process.

options.name: -suffix
options.description: Specifies the suffix to be appended to the spare cells.

options.name: -tieCell
options.description: Specifies the existing tie cells to be reused to make tie connections for newly created SPARE instance in the design. You can only specify a maximum of two tie-cells, where one cell must be a tie-high driver, and the other a tie-low driver. The two tie-cell names must be surrounded by quotation marks.

options.name: -useGACells
options.description: Specifies the site name of the gate array cell.

options.name: -useGAFillerCells
options.description: Specifies a list of Gate Array (GA)-style filler cells that the tool can replace with GA cells during post-mask ECO. You can only use this parameter in a post-mask ECO flow.
